tables: UPSSSC UP Combined Lower Subordinate Services (Graduate Level) Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Result, Mains Exam Fee Payment

Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has Released UP Combined Lower Subordinate Services (Graduate Level) Advt. No. 07-Exam/2026 Recruitment Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this UPSSSC Lower PCS Vacancy 2026 can Apply Online from 29/05/2026 to 25/06/2026. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information.

Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) UPSSSC Lower PCS (Graduate Level) Recruitment 2026 UPSSSC Advt No. 07-Exam/2026 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® : SarkariResult.Com Official

Important Dates Application Begin : 29/05/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 25 /06/2026 Last Date Pay Exam Fee : 25/06/2026 Correction Last Date: 02/07/2026 Eligibility Result Available : 16/07/2026 Mains Exam Fee Payment Start : 20/07/2026 UPSSSC Lower PCS Mains Exam Date : 23/08/2026 Admit Card Available : Before Exam
Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 25/- SC / ST : 25/- PH (Divyang) : 25/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking

UPSSSC Lower PCS Notification 2025 : Age Limit as on 01/07/2026 Minimum Age : 18  Years Maximum Age : 40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per UPSSSC Lower PCS Recruitment Advt. No 07-Exam/2026 Exam Rules.
